description: These low top shoes are inspired by converse's lucky charm Chuck Taylor - Basketball player turned salesman. Iconic and synonymous with style and youth culture, these shoes reflect a fusion of sport and style. Wear this with form fitting denims, a monochrome tee and a casual jacket.UpperCanvas upper with stitch detailing for shoe structureCentral lacing system with a long tongue for comfortRubber overlay on the toe box to protect the toe regionReinforced overlay at the heel region for good shoe structureMetal eyelets on the midfoot for ventilationMidsolePU midsole with branding on the heel and PU foxing on the toe regionOutsoleRubber outsole with terraced grooves and patterned lugsShoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
